header.description: Networking Equipment Selector knowledge base for the Cisco Meraki MS130 and MS150 Series switches (native Meraki cloud-managed access switches — distinct from the Catalyst 9200L-M/9300L-M hybrid Meraki-managed models, which live in their own C9200/C9300 KB files). Carries the catalog (atomic SKU facts), groups (named shared compatibility sets), and switch models for MS130 (compact access) and MS150 (stackable access). Structure: catalog + groups + models.
design_notes: Skeleton only (created ahead of any datasheet data): catalog, groups, and models are all empty. Populated in parts per project convention, from data pasted into the authoring session — never invented or inferred: (1) MS130 catalog + groups, (2) MS130 models, (3) MS150 catalog + groups, (4) MS150 models. header.sources is filled in once the datasheet reference (name/URL/date) is known.

New legal_values needed on an EXISTING axis (e.g. 'MS130'/'MS150' added to the 'series' enum, or any new stacking_technology/poe_type/license_tier value these native-Meraki models turn out to need) are a STRUCTURAL change per this schema's $authoring.cheap_vs_structural block and switching-axes.json's own change_policy — these are flagged for explicit human sign-off, never made unilaterally.

catalog._comment: Atomic SKU facts. One row per real orderable component. What a thing IS, independent of which switch uses it.

groups._comment: Named shared compatibility sets referencing catalog SKUs by id.
